patch.comment: chore: declare minimum supported Node.js version (>=18) in package.json engines

minor.comment: fix(rune): patch Node console format-string injection (log forging via namespace) and __proto__ bracket-assignment prototype hijack (serializeErrors/redactObject/resolveBindings); stop entry.data aliasing internal bindings, serialize Error values in pinned bindings (not just per-call context), isolate transport/middleware failures in dispatch() using RuneTransportError, export PRIORITY, fix README Rune/sample drift, drop unused devOnly()
minor.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
